case_title: REGGIO HEARN VS. HUSTED PROPERTY SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HEARN, REGGIO HUSTED PROPERTY SERVICES INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HUSTED PROPERTY SERVICES INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HEARN, REGGIO AS TO DEFENDANT HUSTED PROPERTY SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF REGGIO HEARN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUSTED PROPERTY SERVICES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRET HUSTED DIRECTOR OF THE CORPORATION. THE DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. THE COURT DETERMINED THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM PROPERLY BELONGS IN ARBITRATION AND AS TO THE OTHER PARTIES. THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED SO PLAINTIFF MAY PROCEED WITH ARBITRATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
